description_long: This is a thick, rectangular hardcover book with a textured, cloth-like red cover and gold-toned edges on the pages. The front cover features a stylized script title and a decorative emblem resembling a torch or flame, both rendered in a light, metallic color. The book's spine and cover show signs of wear, with visible texture and slight fraying along the edges, suggesting age or frequent handling. The pages are tightly bound and appear slightly yellowed, indicating the book may be vintage or well-used. The cover design is minimal, with no elaborate illustration, focusing instead on the title and emblem. The overall appearance is classic and formal, suitable for a personal library or as a found object in an urban environment.
description: A thick, vintage hardcover book with a textured red cover, gold-toned page edges, and minimal decorative elements. The cover features a stylized title and a torch emblem in metallic ink.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing the stylized title and torch emblem, with the gold-toned page edges prominent at the bottom.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the side, highlighting the textured red spine and the gold-toned, slightly uneven page edges.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, plain and textured, with the gold-toned page edges at the bottom and no visible illustration.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the book is shown, focusing on the spine's texture and the layered appearance of the page edges.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is covered in the same textured red material as the cover, with no visible decorative elements or text in the provided views. The design is plain and unadorned.
